narrative:
Barberton 5-B (precinct in Summit County) has 1,080 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.4 percentage points.
